problem_statement: The cancellation workflow must be able to verify a booking, cancel it, and provide a clear explanation of the refund outcome to the customer.
goal: Enable customers to cancel their bookings and ensure they are informed about the refund process.
acceptance_criteria: The booking should be verified before cancellation.
A successful cancellation should update the booking status accordingly.
A clear explanation of the refund outcome should be provided to the customer.
repo_summary: README.md(1), agents(9), alembic(5), app(49), data(17), pyproject.toml(1), railway.json(1), techmellon_airline_backend.egg-info(4)
localization_rationale: The cancellation workflow is likely to be implemented in the booking routes and services, which handle API requests and business logic related to bookings.
The booking model would be essential for verifying existence and state of bookings.
